calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-032c AIC descending modulation -- reef (monostrategy fix)
items.note: SD-050 reef breaks monostrategy on 10x10 grid; also fixes hardcoded world_obs_dim=250 bug

items.title: MECH-257/SD-013/ARC-033 dual-function E2 comparator -- reef (monostrategy fix)
items.note: SD-050 reef breaks monostrategy on 10x10 grid; random policy, diagnostic experiment

items.title: ARC-016 adaptive commit_threshold via E2 PE variance -- reef (monostrategy fix)
items.note: SD-050 reef breaks monostrategy on 10x10 grid; unblocks C2 regime sensitivity measurement

items.title: SD-016 context memory reef fix: 2x2 factorial {SD-016, reef}
items.note: 418i FAILed with action_class_entropy ~1e-10 (monostrategy). SD-050 reef (EXQ-522 PASS, zone_transitions=48.9) provides env-entropy precondition needed for SD-016 ContextMemory to produce context-dependent outputs.

items.title: SD-049 Phase 2 reef-environment behavioural validation (monostrategy fix for 514b)
items.note: 514b C2b FAIL (probe_acc_neighborhood=0.483 < 0.6): monostrategy in 8x8/0-hazard env gave weak contrastive z_resource signal. Reef (EXQ-522 PASS, 2 behavioral attractors, zone_transitions=48.9) provides per-type neighborhood diversity needed for identity encoder training.
